sourceFacts.description: LangGraph uses DAG-based state machines for agent workflows

hypothesis.claim: Explicit state machine transitions for worker lifecycle reduce status inconsistency bugs
hypothesis.reasoning: LangGraph DAG model makes transitions explicit and auditable, unlike current free-form status field updates

experiment.description: Add state machine validation to active-workers.json writer

concerns: Migration effort for existing status consumers

sourceFacts.description: MemGPT tiered memory: working, archival, episodic with active management

hypothesis.claim: Adding a structured memory retrieval layer to meta-signals improves issue production quality
hypothesis.reasoning: Current meta-signals.json is a flat dump. MemGPT-style tiered memory with relevance ranking would help the issue producer focus on the most impactful gaps

experiment.description: Add relevance scoring to calculate-meta-signals.js based on recency and impact
successCriteria: Top-3 meta-signals always match current system state

sourceFacts.description: Claude Code hooks enable pre/post execution guards on tool calls

hypothesis.claim: Adding Claude Code hooks for forbiddenFiles enforcement provides defense-in-depth against constitution violations
hypothesis.reasoning: Currently seed-constitution rules are enforced only at task-contract level. Hooks would catch violations at the tool-call level

experiment.description: Add pre-tool hooks that check file writes against forbiddenFiles patterns
successCriteria: Hook blocks writes to src/**, prisma/**
Hook logs violations to audit trail

concerns: Hook execution adds latency to tool calls

sourceFacts.description: Reflexion agents improve by reflecting on failures and storing self-critiques

hypothesis.claim: Adding a failure reflection step to classify-self-cycle-failure.js that generates actionable self-critiques reduces repeat failures
hypothesis.reasoning: Current failure classification produces categories but not actionable lessons. Reflexion-style self-critiques stored in meta-signals would prevent repeating the same mistakes

experiment.description: Extend classify-self-cycle-failure.js to generate structured self-critiques and store them in meta-signals
successCriteria: Subsequent cycles avoid past failure patterns

concerns: Self-critique quality depends on failure context richness
